name: Potato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sliced green onions - OR - chopped onion
1/2 cup Pancake & Waffle Mix (Aunt Jemima Original)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet to form a 1/4-inch layer and cook over medium-high heat until the oil reaches 375°F.
2. Combine all remaining ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
3. Drop about 1/4 cup of potato mixture into the hot oil, shaping each portion into a slightly flattened circle.
4. Fry for 2 to 3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
5. Drain excess oil on absorbent paper.
6. Serve hot with applesauce or sour cream, if desired.
NUTRITIONAL ANALYSIS per serving:
calories 208
carbohydrates 22 g
protein 3 g
fat 12 g
calcium 61 mg
sodium 170 mg
cholesterol 0 mg
dietary fiber 3 g
